zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Mauduit於1214年12月27日出生在英國巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普時，她的父親William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope19歲，母親Alice de Beaumont19歲。她於大約1235年與William de Beauchamp在英國武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1268年1月7日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素享年53歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾庫辛爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Mauduit于1214年12月27日出生在英国巴金哈姆爾韓斯洛普时，她的父亲William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope19岁，母亲Alice de Beaumont19岁。她于大约1235年与William de Beauchamp在英国武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1268年1月7日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾艾爾姆利 卡素享年53岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾庫辛爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mauduit
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Mawditt
meanings: Norman, English: nickname from Old French mal-duit ‘badly brought up, ill educated’ (Latin male doctus).

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Mauduit was born on 27 December 1214, in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, was 19 and her mother, Alice de Beaumont, was 19. She married William de Beauchamp about 1235, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 7 January 1268, in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53, and was buried in Cookhill, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Mauduit est née le 27 décembre 1214, à Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alice de Beaumont, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William de Beauchamp environ 1235, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 janvier 1268, à Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Cookhill, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Mauduit am 27. Dezember 1214 in Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope 19 und ihre Mutter Alice de Beaumont 19. Sie hat um 1235 in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England William de Beauchamp geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. Januar 1268 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Cookhill, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Mauduit è nata il il 27 dicembre 1214 nel Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, England, sua padre, William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alice de Beaumont, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William de Beauchamp circa 1235, nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 7 gennaio 1268, nel Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Cookhill, Worcestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Mauduitが1214年12月27日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアハンスロペで生まれた時，父William Mauduit Lord of Hanslopeは19歳，母Alice de Beaumontは19歳であった。約1235年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルでWilliam de Beauchampと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1268年1月7日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアエルムリー カストルで53歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアコオクヒルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Mauduit(이)가 1214년 12월 27일 영국 벅잉함실르 핸슬로프에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Beaumont(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1235년 영국 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 William de Beauchamp(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 1월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 엘리 카스틀에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 쿡힐에 묻혔다.

pt.27.12.1214–7 Jan 1268: 27 de dezembro de 1214–7 de janeiro de 1268

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Mauduit nasceu em 27 de dezembro de 1214, em Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Beaumont, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1235, em Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de janeiro de 1268, em Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Cookhill, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Mauduit родилась 27 декабря 1214 г. в местности ханслоп, буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Beaumont, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Beauchamp около 1235 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 7 января 1268 г. в местности элмли кастл, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности кухилл, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Mauduit nació el 27 de diciembre de 1214, en Hanslope, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Mauduit Lord of Hanslope, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alice de Beaumont, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William de Beauchamp aproximadamente 1235, en Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 7 de enero de 1268, en Elmley Castle, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Cookhill, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
